title: Composites: model health certificates
body: "Composites exported to Great Britain must be accompanied by the relevant health certificate. Exporters should read the guide on how to complete a health certificate.  Certificate GBHC440  Must be used from 30 April 2024 by all countries.  Model health certificate for composite products intended for human consumption (Regulation 28/2012) (COMP).  Certificate GBHC441  Must be used from 30 April 2024 by all countries.  Model health certificate for transit or storage of composite products intended for human consumption (Regulation 28/2012) (COMP-T/S). "

taxons.title: Import, export and distribution of food
